Schools Cleaning Services

CDC-compliant cleaning for K-12 schools, charter schools, private academies, and universities. Green Seal certified products safe for students and staff. GreenPoint Maintenance Services is an MBE-certified provider serving facilities across NY, NJ, CT, PA, and FL with real-time cleaning verification through JaniTrack.

Get an Instant Quote →Schedule Walkthrough
School Cleaning

What's Included in Our School Cleaning Program

Every school cleaning engagement includes a customized cleaning plan built around your facility's specific needs, schedule, and compliance requirements.

✓
CDC-compliant classroom sanitization protocols
✓
Cafeteria and gymnasium deep cleaning
✓
Non-toxic, allergy-safe products for children
✓
Flexible after-hours and summer scheduling
✓
Locker room and restroom rotation programs
✓
Athletic facility and playground maintenance
CDC GuidelinesEPA N-List DisinfectantsGreen Seal CertifiedOSHA Compliant

Common School Cleaning Challenges We Solve

Facility managers consistently tell us about the same frustrations with their previous cleaning providers. Here's how GreenPoint addresses each one.

✓
Student health and allergy concerns from chemical exposure
✓
Inconsistent cleaning during school year vs summer
✓
High-traffic restrooms requiring multiple daily turnovers
✓
Cafeteria sanitation and food safety compliance

Service Areas for School Cleaning

We provide school cleaning services across five states. Select your location to learn more.

✓
New York (NY): Bronx, Manhattan, Brooklyn, Queens, Staten Island, Yonkers, New Rochelle, Mount Vernon, White Plains, Westchester
✓
New Jersey (NJ): Newark, Jersey City, Paterson, Elizabeth, Hackensack, Fort Lee, Hoboken, Clifton, Passaic, East Orange
✓
Connecticut (CT): Stamford, Bridgeport, New Haven, Hartford, Norwalk, Danbury, Waterbury, Greenwich
✓
Pennsylvania (PA): Philadelphia, Allentown, Scranton, Bethlehem, Reading, King of Prussia, Norristown, Chester
✓
Florida (FL): Orlando, Miami, Fort Lauderdale, Kissimmee, Miami Beach, Coral Gables, Hialeah, Pembroke Pines
